services.title: Our Services
services.description: We offer professional window renovation and painting services in Stockholm. Our experienced craftsmen use high-quality materials to ensure quality and customer satisfaction.
services.service1Description: Renovation and painting of all types of windows. Replacement of energy-saving glass for better insulation
services.service2Description: Environmental-friendly color and product choices. Sustainable renovation that protects the environment
services.service3Description: High-quality products and materials. Professional workmanship and attention to detail

aboutUs.title: About Us
descriptions: Prietos Company is a company created from an idea of improvement in pursuit of creating something superior based on the professional talent acquired over several years, then that idea was reinforced with discipline and effort.

It was started by one person and today we have the support of several very competent workers in the renovation market. It is a company that is very supportive in the fight to preserve the ecosystem through renewable production with products authorized by the work environment

For us, the satisfaction of our customers and their perception of our work after completion of the work is very important. We believe that the customer has the highest priority in deciding on their product, along with our experience in the market.
